missions.name: Methane Prospector Calibration
missions.description: Methane-sniffing prospector satellite is reading negatives across all orbits — almost certainly a sensor drift issue. EVA and recalibrate the mass spectrometer.

missions.name: Sample-Return Beacon Check
missions.description: The beacon that will guide the next sample-return capsule home has a flaky GPS module. EVA out, swap the board, verify lock.

missions.name: Orbital Asset Servicing
missions.description: On-orbit asset is throwing faults across multiple subsystems. Diagnostics inconclusive — EVA out, find the broken parts, patch them in place.

missions.name: Areostationary Telescope Phasing
missions.description: Areostationary survey telescope is out of phase after a dust-storm pressure pulse. EVA, read the wavefront sensor, walk each segment back in by hand.
